_comment: Pre-S27a-fix-2 policies that don't reference public.get_staff_role() on every top-level OR-branch but are intentionally so. New policies (added after S27a-fix-2) must follow the get_staff_role() envelope rule on EVERY top-level OR-branch OR explicitly add the inline marker '-- rls-allow: <reason>' on the line immediately above the CREATE POLICY. Adding entries to this file is reserved for the legacy backfill — do not add new policies here.
_droppedConvention: Some entries describe a CREATE POLICY whose live counterpart was DROPped by a later migration. We keep the original CREATE in the source SQL (migration history is append-only and re-running a migration must remain valid) so the pattern guard still sees it. Mark such entries with the standard reason string: 'DROPped by NNN_<migration_name>.sql; CREATE source preserved per migration-history convention. Live policy in NNN-replacement is enveloped.' Future maintainers adding a new replacement DROP should backfill the prior entry to this convention.
